summary: Frontend-only testing for 3 bug fixes: 1) Canvas receipt rendering in receiptBitmap.js - VERIFIED complete rewrite with all fields. 2) 'Save and Send' kitchen button routing - VERIFIED printOrderToAllPrinters passes invoice settings. 3) Agent Update banner persistence - VERIFIED banner does NOT appear when agent is unreachable (correct behavior).

minor_issues.issue: Console error 'Error accessing index is_synced in store orders' - non-blocking, app continues to work

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: receiptBitmap.js - Complete rewrite with all receipt fields (restaurant_name, phone, phone2, address, tax_number, custom_header, custom_footer, thank_you_message, system_name, customer_phone, delivery_address, items table, subtotal, discount, total, payment_method)

VERIFIED: printService.js - printOrderToAllPrinters passes all invoice settings (phone, phone2, address, tax_number, show_tax, custom_header, custom_footer, thank_you_message, system_name, branch_name)
VERIFIED: POS.js - buildPrintOrderData at line 1277 includes all invoice settings from invoiceSettings and systemInvoiceSettings
VERIFIED: AgentUpdateChecker.js - isVersionOk uses semver-like comparison (major > required OR major == required AND minor >= required)
VERIFIED: AgentUpdateChecker.js - Banner sets needsUpdate=false when agent is unreachable (catch block), so banner does NOT appear when agent is not running
VERIFIED: POS page loads correctly with categories, products, cart section, and action buttons
VERIFIED: Agent update banner NOT visible in preview environment (correct - agent localhost:9999 not reachable)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified via code review and UI testing. The print agent (localhost:9999) runs on user's local Windows machine and cannot be tested in preview environment. Key verifications: 1) receiptBitmap.js has complete Canvas receipt renderer with all fields. 2) printOrderToAllPrinters passes invoice settings to kitchen printers. 3) AgentUpdateChecker banner correctly hides when agent is unreachable.

verified_features.description: Complete rewrite with all receipt fields matching POS preview
Passes all invoice settings to kitchen printers
Builds complete print data with invoice settings at line 1277
Banner does NOT appear when agent is unreachable (correct behavior)
verified_features.logic: catch block sets needsUpdate=false, so banner hidden when fetch fails

verified_features.description: Uses semver-like >= comparison (major > required OR major == required AND minor >= required)
Categories, products, cart section, action buttons all visible
